functional_requirements: The system shall allow administrators to create, edit, and delete clubs.
The system shall allow administrators to appoint student council coordinators and club coordinators from registered students.
The system shall allow club coordinators to add and edit club information including name, description, and membership criteria.
The system shall allow club coordinators to schedule events and club activities with date, time, venue, and description.
The system shall allow the student council coordinator to approve or reject event proposals submitted by club coordinators.
The system shall allow administrators to give final approval for events after student council coordinator approval.
The system shall allow club coordinators to manage club membership by adding or removing members.
The system shall allow all university students to view club event schedules and details.
The system shall allow students to register for club events.
The system shall support Google Sign-In API for authentication for all user types.
performance_requirements: The system shall support a minimum of 5000 concurrent users without performance degradation.
The system shall have an average page load time of under 2 seconds under normal load conditions.
design_constraints: The system shall be developed as a web application compatible with modern browsers including Chrome, Firefox, Safari, and Edge.
The system shall follow responsive design principles to support both desktop and mobile devices.
The system shall use the Google Sign-In API as the sole authentication mechanism.
The system codebase shall follow industry-standard coding conventions with comprehensive documentation.
external_interfaces: The system shall integrate with Google Sign-In API for user authentication and shall redirect users back to the portal after successful login.
The system shall provide a REST API interface for potential future mobile application integration.
The system shall send email notifications to users via an SMTP-based email service for event approvals and registrations.
security_requirements: All data transmitted between client and server shall be encrypted using TLS 1.2 or higher.
The system shall implement role-based access control with four distinct roles: administrator, student council coordinator, club coordinator, and student.
The system shall log all administrative actions including club creation, deletion, and coordinator appointments with timestamps.
User session tokens shall expire after 24 hours of inactivity.
use_cases: Actor: Administrator. Purpose: Create a new club. Flow: Admin logs in, navigates to club management, enters club details, assigns coordinator, submits. System creates club and notifies coordinator.
Actor: Club Coordinator. Purpose: Schedule a club event. Flow: Coordinator logs in, selects club, creates event with details, submits for approval. System notifies student council coordinator.
Actor: Student. Purpose: Register for an event. Flow: Student logs in, browses events, selects event, clicks register. System confirms registration and sends confirmation email.
